name: vitan-pmc
description: Vitan PMC — project-management console for an architect-led PMC. Monorepo root.

scripts.check:web: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.check:api: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter api build
